---
title: "\'Debatable Ground\'"
---

## \'Debatable Ground\'

**Author:** Christabel Rose Coleridge
**Date:** 1886-1894
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (May 1886-January 1894)

### Notes

This was a long-running essay competition organized by Christabel Coleridge.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
